Localization.Description: An external connection to a bind shell

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An external connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to a bind shell on host {event_src.host} created by user {subject.account.name} using the {subject.process.name} utility is detected
An external connection to a bind shell from host {src.host}:{src.port} using the {subject.process.name} utility is detected on host {event_src.host}
